methodsAttempted.query: site:univ-brest.fr ("ChatGPT" OR "intelligence artificielle" OR "IA générative" OR "generative AI" OR "artificial intelligence") (charte OR guide OR règlement OR plagiat OR examen OR données OR bibliothèque) "Université de Bretagne Occidentale"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found an official UBO announcement about the generative AI charter, the 2026 digital charter PDF, the 2026 generative AI charter PDF linked from the announcement, the official UBO library AI guidance page, and the 2024 anti-plagiarism charter PDF.
Robots.txt permits the public announcement and file URLs used here; admin, search, login, and oembed paths are disallowed and were not accessed.
Robots.txt permits the public library page path used here; search, admin, media upload, and other disallowed paths were not accessed.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a university-wide UBO generative AI charter approved by the board on 12 March 2026, an official announcement explaining its scope, the official anti-plagiarism charter, and a library guidance page. Claims are limited to the formal charter and anti-plagiarism charter; taxonomy, training/news, and intranet-only materials are not used as claim evidence.

artifacts.claimText: UBO announced that its board adopted a generative AI charter on 12 March 2026 as a corollary to the digital resources charter, and the announcement says the two regulations engage the whole university community.

artifacts.claimText: UBO's generative AI charter says that, unless teaching staff communicate otherwise, student work for assessment should not be produced by generative AI tools in replacement of the expected reflective and intellectual process; otherwise it would constitute established cheating and could be sanctioned.

artifacts.sourceTitle: L’UBO renouvelle sa charte du numérique et adopte une charte d'utilisation de l'IA générative
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Ce jeudi 12 mars, le conseil d’Administration a adopté la nouvelle charte d’usage des ressources informatiques et numériques de l’UBO, ainsi que son corollaire : la charte d’utilisation de l’intelligence artificielle générative (IAg). Coup de projecteur sur ces deux règlements qui engagent l’ensemble de la communauté universitaire.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: On 12 March, UBO's board adopted the digital resources charter and its generative AI charter corollary; the page says these two regulations engage the whole university community.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: L’UBO renouvelle sa charte du numérique et adopte une charte d'utilisation de l'IA générative
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d’utilisation de l’IA générative à l’Université de Brest
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: L’IAg ne doit pas être utilisée pour traiter des données sensibles ... L’IAg non-souveraine ne doit pas être utilisée pour traiter des données confidentielles (données de la recherche, économiques ou stratégiques de l’établissement, d’une de ses entités, de ses personnels ou de ses usagers).
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Generative AI must not process sensitive data; non-sovereign generative AI must not process confidential data such as research, economic, strategic, staff, or user data.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Charte d’utilisation de l’IA générative à l’Université de Brest
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d’utilisation de l’IA générative à l’Université de Brest
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Sauf indication contraire spécifique communiquée par le personnel enseignant, les travaux réalisés par les étudiantes et étudiants en vue de l’évaluation des connaissances et compétences acquises ne sauraient être produits par de tels outils, en remplacement d’une démarche réflexive et intellectuelle. Dans le cas contraire, cela constituerait un cas de triche avéré et pourrait être sanctionné.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Unless teaching staff specify otherwise, assessed student work should not be produced by these tools in place of the expected reflective and intellectual process; otherwise it is established cheating and may be sanctioned.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Charte d’utilisation de l’IA générative à l’Université de Brest
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d’utilisation de l’IA générative à l’Université de Brest
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Seules les IAg validées et mentionnées comme souveraines par l’établissement, peuvent être librement utilisées, tout en respectant les principes énoncées précédemment. Aucune information confidentielle ou sensible ne doit être communiquée à une IAg non souveraine.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Only institution-validated generative AI tools identified as sovereign may be freely used, while respecting the stated principles; no confidential or sensitive information should be given to non-sovereign generative AI.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Charte d’utilisation de l’IA générative à l’Université de Brest
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d’utilisation de l’IA générative à l’Université de Brest
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Lorsqu’une IAg a été utilisée pour produire ou aider à la production d’un contenu, il est obligatoire académique ou professionnel d’en faire mention dans le document final. Les informations à préciser sont : Le nom et la version de l’outil; La date d’utilisation; L’usage qui en a été fait; Le niveau de supervision ou de validation humaine.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: When generative AI was used to produce or help produce academic or professional content, the final document must mention the tool name/version, date, use, and level of human supervision or validation.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Annexe 1 - Comment citer l’utilisation d’une IAg

artifacts.title: Université de Bretagne Occidentale generative AI charter staged review
artifacts.summary: Official UBO sources show that the university adopted a generative AI charter in March 2026. Staged claims cover charter status and scope, sensitive/confidential data restrictions, assessment-work limits, validated sovereign tool treatment, AI-use disclosure, and the anti-plagiarism charter's AI citation requirement.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The library guidance page was treated as support/context rather than binding policy evidence.
The intranet AI resources page was not accessed because it is described as community-only intranet content.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
